name: Instagram Configure Bio
description: Opens Instagram, navigates to Edit Profile, clears the existing bio, and types a new bio.

params.bio: The bio text to set on the profile

steps.goal: Open Instagram. If you see any popup or dialog (like 'Not now', 'Skip', account suggestions, or a Google sign-in prompt), dismiss it by tapping 'Not now', 'Skip', 'X', or pressing Back. If you see someone else's profile or a post, press Back until you see the home feed. To navigate to your own profile, look for a small profile picture or avatar icon in the bottom-right corner of the screen and tap it. If you can't find the profile icon in the element list, tap at the bottom-right area of the screen (coordinates approximately [990, 2170] on a 1080-wide screen). Once on your profile page (you should see 'Edit profile' button, your posts count, followers count), tap 'Edit profile'. Wait for the Edit Profile screen to load — you should see fields like Name, Username, Bio.

You are on the Edit Profile screen. Find the Bio field — it is a text field that may contain existing bio text or say 'Bio'. Tap on the Bio field to open the bio editor. Select all existing text and delete it (clear the field completely). Then type the following bio exactly: '{{bio}}'. Verify the text appears in the field. Do NOT tap Done yet.

The bio field should now contain the new text. Tap the checkmark or 'Done' button (top-right corner) to save the changes. If Instagram shows any dialog or popup (like 'Link accounts', Google sign-in, or 'Not now'), dismiss it by tapping 'Not now', 'Skip', 'X', or pressing Back. If you end up on the Instagram feed or profile page, the save was successful — mark done.
